description: A new product has been developed, and an EHS specialist needs to author a new Safety Data Sheet (SDS) from scratch.

nodes.task_description: Create a new SDS document linked to the new product code.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a blank, 16-section SDS template.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the product's formulation and use it to populate Section 3 (Composition).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly lists the product's components and their percentages.

nodes.task_description: Use a built-in calculation engine to determine the GHS classification (e.g., pictograms, hazard statements) based on the components and populate Section 2.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the GHS classification tool and populates the hazard information correctly.
